public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as quartermaster.
manner: Sounds hospitable until terms blur, then becomes sharply attentive to cost and precedent. In Soreheim Alliance, that reads as someone quota-aware, contribution-minded, and structurally pragmatic, filtering choices through communal ambition, and the habits of a quartermaster still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of quartermaster in and around Ashforge Quarry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ashforge Quarry workable through the obligations of quartermaster while managing the immediate pressure of predators in Soreheim Alliance.
hidden_pressure: Must balance relationship value against immediate margin without losing either entirely. Around Ashforge Quarry, that usually means carrying predators, avalanches, geothermal bursts without letting the role of quartermaster visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Korin Ashmason will trade route, scarcity, or faction insight once the party resolves a commercial problem others cannot touch openly.
Korin Ashmason needs help protecting a shipment, recovering leverage, or stabilizing exchange around Ashforge Quarry before trust collapses.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Korin Ashmason read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation. In Ashforge Quarry, this lands inside a public field already shaped by Hill Giant foremen, industrial clans.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ashforge Quarry: markets, counting tables, depots, ports, inns, or contract rooms
who_avoids_them: those who waste time without value
